description.overview: A fast, athletic coonhound known for their speed and endurance. Treeing Walkers are smart, loving dogs with a competitive spirit.
description.history: The Treeing Walker Coonhound originated in United States.
description.temperament: Known for being smart, brave, courteous.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their short, smooth, glossy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: A fast, athletic coonhound known for their speed and endurance. Treeing Walkers are smart, loving dogs with a competitive spirit.
